name: subtr-actor-stats-player
description: Stats-focused replay player UI for subtr-actor Rocket League replay workflows

scripts.generate:stats-types:
sh -lc 'root=$(cd ../.. && pwd -P) && out="$root/js/stat-evaluation-player/src/generated" && mkdir -p "$out" && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" collector::stats_timeline_types::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::backboard::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::backboard_bounce::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::ball_carry::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::boost::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::ceiling_shot::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::demo::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::dodge_reset::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::double_tap::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::fifty_fifty::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::live_play::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::match_stats::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::movement::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::musty_flick::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::positioning::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::possession::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::powerslide::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::pressure::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::rush::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::speed_flip::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::touch::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::export::export_bindings --lib && find "$out" -type f -name "*.ts" -exec sed -i "s/[[:space:]]\+$//" {} + && printf "%s
" "export type { HeaderPropTs } from "subtr-actor-player/generated/HeaderPropTs";" > "$out/HeaderPropTs.ts" && printf "%s
" "export type { PlayerInfo } from "subtr-actor-player/generated/PlayerInfo";" > "$out/PlayerInfo.ts" && printf "%s
" "export type { Ps4IdTs } from "subtr-actor-player/generated/Ps4IdTs";" > "$out/Ps4IdTs.ts" && printf "%s
" "export type { PsyNetIdTs } from "subtr-actor-player/generated/PsyNetIdTs";" > "$out/PsyNetIdTs.ts" && printf "%s
" "export type { RemoteIdTs } from "subtr-actor-player/generated/RemoteIdTs";" > "$out/RemoteIdTs.ts" && printf "%s
" "export type { ReplayMeta } from "subtr-actor-player/generated/ReplayMeta";" > "$out/ReplayMeta.ts" && printf "%s
" "export type { SwitchIdTs } from "subtr-actor-player/generated/SwitchIdTs";" > "$out/SwitchIdTs.ts"'
scripts.verify:stats-types: sh -lc 'root=$(cd ../.. && pwd -P) && generated="$root/js/stat-evaluation-player/src/generated" && snapshot=$(mktemp -d) && trap "rm -rf \"$snapshot\"" EXIT && if [ -d "$generated" ]; then cp -r "$generated/." "$snapshot/"; fi && ../scripts/with-clean-npm-env.sh node --run=generate:stats-types && diff -ruN "$snapshot" "$generated"'
scripts.build: ../scripts/with-clean-npm-env.sh node --run=build:bindings && ../scripts/with-clean-npm-env.sh node --run=build:player && ../scripts/with-clean-npm-env.sh node --run=check && vite build && ../scripts/with-clean-npm-env.sh node --run=build:types

author: Ivan Malison <ivanmalison@gmail.com>
